# P1 ALL_CAPS Constant FP Fixture

This plan mentions an environment variable once.  It is a constant name
(all-uppercase with underscores), not a plan-structural identifier.  P1
must not flag it.

## Configuration

Override the cost cap via the `PLAN_FORGE_COST_CAP_USD` environment
variable.  Values above $5.00 require an explicit confirmation flag.

## Design

The constant above is illustrative.  No cross-reference is required.
